title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to help teachers introduce AI and machine learning to school-aged students. The program provides research-backed curricula including lessons, videos, worksheets, and training that emphasize responsible and ethical AI use, and has reached educators in over 165 countries.
